utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Th ... th ... that is all it is , a third nipple .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Just your run ... of ... the ... mill third nipple .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Just slice that baby right off !

utterances.speaker: Dr. Rhodes
utterances.text: Take your shirt off , and let see what we are dealing with here . What are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Just showing you my run ... of ... the ... mill ... slice ... it ... right ... off third nipple .

utterances.speaker: Dr. Rhodes
utterances.text: Well that is not a third nipple .
